metadata.description: Adds or updates a single lifecycle rule (delete blobs in a container older than N days) on an existing Azure Storage Account WITHOUT overwriting other existing rules. A deploymentScript reads the current management policy, merges in this rule (replacing any rule with the same name), and writes the merged policy back.
Name of the existing Storage Account to apply the lifecycle policy to.
Name of the blob container to filter on. Blobs in this container older than 'daysToDelete' will be deleted.
Number of days after last modification before a blob is deleted.
Location for the managed identity and deployment script resources.
Used to force the merge script to run on every deployment. Leave at default.
